shows.title: The Book of Mormon
shows.description: Say hello to the Tony Award-winning Best Musical by the creators of *South Park* and *Avenue Q*. The story of two Mormon missionaries who get more than they bargained for when sent to convert an African village has spread the good word on Broadway for more than a decade.

shows.title: Speakeasy Magick
shows.description: In the Off-Broadway experience *Speakeasy Magick*, discerning members of the public who can keep a secret are invited to share an unforgettable night. Get ready for an unprecedented night of magic as you’ve never before seen, featuring a changing roster of New York City’s best magicians.

shows.title: The Play That Goes Wrong
shows.description: Nonstop wrongs make one hilarious right at this slapstick comedy play from Mischief Theatre Company. Two hours of laughs await at this show about an amateur theatre troupe running into mishap after mishap at the opening night of their new murder mystery show.

shows.title: Heathers The Musical
shows.description: *Heathers* is a musical comedy based on the cult film and follows Veronica as she tries to navigate teenage issues, first love, and three Heathers who rule the school with an iron fist.

shows.title: Gazillion Bubble Show
shows.description: See the bubblicious spectacular that's dazzled audiences for more than a decade and counting. Bubble tricks and a colorful light show combine to make a mesmerizing, one-of-a-kind theatrical experience perfect for even the youngest theatregoers.

shows.title: The 25th Annual Putnam County Spelling Bee
shows.description: *The 25th Annual Putnam County Spelling Bee* is a charming and witty musical about adolescent students competing to win a local spelling competition while coping with teenage issues along the way.

shows.title: Chamber Magic
shows.description: A riveting evening of mind-blowing, interactive magic, hosted by Steve Cohen. Take part in this unusual and perfect date night experience.

shows.title: Singfeld! A Musical About Nothing
shows.description: Relive all the funniest moments from the classic sitcom at this musical parody. See Jerry, George, Elaine, and Kramer's most iconic adventures set to hilarious songs like "The Master of their Domain," "Seasons of George," and "The Yadda Yadda Song."

shows.title: The Outsiders
shows.description: You've read S. E. Hinton's book, you've seen Francis Ford Coppola's film, now see the stirring musical adaptation. Folk showtunes by Jamestown Revival give new life to the story about teenage street gangsters finding hope and brotherhood in a world that rejects them.

shows.title: Evita
shows.description: *Evita* is the riveting story of the rise and fall of the glamorous First Lady of Argentina.

shows.title: Much Ado About Nothing
shows.description: *Much Ado About Nothing* is Shakespeare's classic comedy about two pairs of lovers that form during a group of soldiers' visit to Italy.

shows.title: Death of a Salesman
shows.description: *Death of a Salesman* is a classic family drama about a father who works on the road, juggling his career, personal life, and the American Dream.

shows.title: The Fear of 13
shows.description: *The Fear of 13* is a true story about a wrongly convicted man and his years-long fight for justice.

shows.title: The Saviors
shows.venue: Atlantic Theater Company - Linda Gross Theater
shows.description: *The Saviors* is a new play about faith, boyhood, and the bonds that break and tie.

shows.title: Giant
shows.description: *Giant* dramatizes a period of Roald Dahl's life after the 1983 literary review of one of his picture books.

shows.title: Inter Alia
shows.description: *Inter Alia* is a legal drama where a sharp lawyer tries to keep her personal life out of the courtroom, until one event changes everything.

shows.title: Schmigadoon! on Broadway
shows.description: *Schmigadoon!* is a musical comedy based on the hit TV show that spoofs Broadway's Golden Age.

shows.title: The Rocky Horror Show
shows.description: *The Rocky Horror Show* is a cult classic musical about a young, straight-laced couple who wanders into a mansion that unleashes a cast of colorful characters, their own desires, and plenty of zany fun.

shows.title: KENREX
shows.description: *Kenrex* is a true crime drama about Ken McElroy, a man from Missouri convicted of second-degree assault.

shows.title: Galileo
shows.description: *Galileo* is a new musical about an ancient story: a man, his discoveries, and the powers he challenged to fight for the truth.

shows.title: Celebrity Autobiography
shows.description: *Celebrity Autobiography* is just that: a hilarious reading of stars' memoirs, read aloud by stars who didn't write those memoirs.

shows.title: Hugo Marchand | Artists at the Center
Are You Now or Have You Ever Been
shows.description: *Are You Now Or Have You Ever Been* is an American docudrama about the tense world of the 1940s House Committee on Un-American Activities hearings.

shows.title: Jerome
shows.description: *Jerome* is a new play about an aging gay couple who meets a stranger in their Arizona ghost town.

shows.title: Paradise Club Presents: Salvage City Supper Club
Billy Crystal 860
shows.description: *860* is Billy Crystal's one-person show about the Los Angeles fires — and losing his own home.

shows.title: Chess on Broadway
shows.description: Chess is a musical about a World Chess Championship, an American facing off against a Russian, and the woman torn between the two of them.

shows.title: A Walk on the Moon
shows.venue: The Laura Pels Theatre at the Harold and Miriam Steinberg Center for Theatre
shows.description: Based on the hit film, *A Walk on the Moon* is the stirring new musical about one mother's great leap into her own future.

shows.title: Kingfish's Blues Jam
shows.venue: Rose Theater, Jazz at Lincoln Center’s Frederick P. Rose Hall

shows.title: Jim Henson's Fraggle Rock: Back to the Rock LIVE
Dog Day Afternoon
shows.description: Based on the hit film, *Dog Day Afternoon* is a raw, gritty story about a man's desperate to rob a bank.

shows.title: Hamilton
shows.description: How does a show about an American Founding Father go on to revolutionize Broadway? Experience Lin-Manuel Miranda's Pulitzer- and Tony-winning hip-hop musical about how Alexander Hamilton fought, feuded, and financed his way into the history books.

shows.title: Hadestown
shows.description: Greek mythology gets a folksy, jazzy twist at this eight-time Tony-winning Best Musical. The story of the musician Orpheus's journey to the underworld to rescue his lover, Eurydice, takes on new depths of life and emotion in Anaïs Mitchell's show.

shows.title: Little Shop of Horrors
shows.description: When a nerdy flower shop worker finds a mysterious talking plant, it completely changes his life — but at a bloody cost. Go down to Skid Row for the latest revival of Alan Menken and Howard Ashman's horror comedy blossoming off Broadway.

shows.title: Friends The Musical Parody
shows.description: Be there for this musical spoof on one of the most beloved sitcoms of all time. Go on an adventure with Chandler, Rachel, Phoebe, Ross, Monica, and Joey and hear all the iconic moments from TV set to hilarious parody songs.

shows.title: Perfect Crime
shows.description: Figure out whodunnit at the longest-running play in New York history. See Catherine Russell, who has set world records for starring in the show since 1987, as a psychiatrist who's the prime suspect in her husband's mysterious, potentially unsolvable murder.

shows.title: La Breve y Maravillosa Vida de Oscar Wao
shows.description: The first-ever stage adaptation in Spanish of this renowned masterpiece.

shows.title: Ragtime
shows.venue: Vivian Beaumont Theater - Lincoln Center Theater
shows.description: Based on the bestselling novel, *Ragtime* is a musical epic that features three fictional families as they move through a rapidly changing New York in pursuit of the American Dream.

shows.title: Heated Rivalry: The Unauthorized Musical Parody
shows.description: *Heated Rivalry: The Unauthorized Musical Parody* satirizes the hit TV show about hockey players falling in love.

shows.title: Every Brilliant Thing
shows.description: *Every Brilliant Thing* is a play about a man who creates a gratitude list to help his mother cope with depression before adopting the practice himself.

shows.title: And Then The Rodeo Burned Down
THE CIRCUIT: An Immersive Silent Disco Ballet
The Lost Boys
shows.description: *The Lost Boys* introduces a new generation to the cult classic movie, in which teenagers move to California and uncover their small town’s underground population of bloodthirsty vampires.

shows.title: Music City
shows.description: *Music City* is a soaring new musical about two singer-songwriters looking to make it big in Nashville.

shows.title: Henry VI: A Trilogy in Two Parts
Disruption
shows.venue: The Romulus Linney Courtyard Theatre at The Pershing Square Signature Center

shows.title: Wicked
shows.description: How did the Wicked Witch of the West become wicked? This *Wizard of Oz* prequel musical explores her and Glinda the Good Witch's untold origin stories. Hear now-classic showtunes like "Defying Gravity" at Broadway's fourth-longest-running show.

shows.title: Chicago
shows.description: The Kander and Ebb musical about murderesses-turned-overnight-celebrities has razzle-dazzled audiences for decades. With a rotating lineup of stars in the lead roles, you never know who you'll see as starry-eyed housewife Roxie, veteran vaudevillian Velma, and more.

shows.title: Moulin Rouge! The Musical
shows.description: Escape into a spectacular Parisian nightclub that's not just a place, but a state of mind. Feel truth, beauty, freedom, and love at the star-crossed love story of a writer and a courtesan, based on the Oscar-winning Baz Luhrmann film and packed with more than 40 pop hits.

shows.title: Buena Vista Social Club
shows.description: The Grammy-winning, landmark Cuban album by the same-named music group is now the basis for a vibrant, celebratory musical, which has been nominated for 10 Tony Awards. Relive the Golden Age of Cuban music while hearing the renaissance of genres like son, bolero, and danzón.

shows.title: Oh, Mary!
shows.description: See this historical dark comedy, now nominated for five Tony Awards, about the untold struggles of Mary Todd Lincoln before she lost Abe. Get a glimpse into Mary's hidden desires and personal struggles, filtered through queer comic playwright Cole Escola's wacky mind.

shows.title: The Great Gatsby
shows.description: Join the party at this new Broadway musical based on F. Scott Fitzgerald's iconic novel. The story of a mysterious millionaire and his quest to win back his former flame is now a splashy musical that brings the Roaring Twenties to life via colorful song and dance.

shows.title: Birthright
shows.venue: The Newman Mills Theatre at the Robert W. Wilson MCC Theatre Space
shows.description: *Birthright* is a new play about six friends, faith, and what it means to belong.

shows.title: MAGIC MIKE LIVE New York
shows.description: *Magic Mike Live* is a ninety-minute saucy dance spectacular inspired by the *Magic Mike* films.

shows.title: Harry Potter and the Cursed Child
shows.description: Go on an adventure through Hogwarts and beyond with a new generation of wizards. Harry, his friends, and his son go on a time-traveling quest in this stage sequel to J. K. Rowling's books, brought to life with special effects that leave audiences of all ages spellbound.

shows.title: Aladdin
shows.description: Your wish for spectacular, magical, all-ages entertainment is granted at this musical adaptation of the Disney film. Hear timeless songs like "A Whole New World" at this story of a ruffian who, with a little help from a genie, transforms into a prince to win over a princess.

shows.title: Titanique
shows.description: Set sail on the Ship of Dreams with Celine Dion, who has the inside scoop on what really happened to Jack and Rose on the doomed Titanic. Dion's greatest hits and up-to-the-minute pop culture jokes power this zany spoof on James Cameron's Oscar-winning film.

shows.title: & Juliet
shows.description: What would happen after *Romeo & Juliet* if Juliet didn't die? That's the question this pop-fueled musical, from songwriting icon Max Martin and a writer on *Schitt’s Creek*, asks. Jam out to tunes made famous by Britney Spears, the Backstreet Boys, Pink, and more.

shows.title: Maybe Happy Ending
shows.description: A unique, contemporary rom-com that won the 2025 Tony Award for Best Musical, *Maybe Happy Ending* follows two robots who meet, connect, and maybe fall in love, getting a second shot at life after the world has deemed them obsolete.

shows.title: Operation Mincemeat
shows.description: *Operation Mincemeat* is a four-time Tony Award-nominated musical based on the Allies’ war operation of the same name that helped them win World War II. Much more than a history lesson, the uproarious comedy is parts farce, thriller, and Ian Fleming-style spy caper.

shows.title: ||: Girls :||: Chance :||: Music :||
shows.description: *||: Girls :||: Chance :||: Music :||*  is about a prestigious girls’ music program in Berkeley where four teens meet and grow together.

shows.title: Joe Turner's Come and Gone
shows.description: *Joe Turner's Come and Gone* is August Wilson's classic play about a Pittsburgh boarding house that is a refuge for Black travelers navigating the upheaval of the Great Migration.

shows.title: The Lion King
shows.description: Join the circle of life at this stage adaptation of the beloved Disney film, on Broadway for 25 years and counting. Awe-inspiring puppetry and timeless songs like "Can You Feel the Love Tonight" bring alive the story of a lion cub growing up to take his rightful place as a leader.

shows.title: SIX
shows.description: This Tony Award-winning pop musical gives 16th-century drama a 21st-century feminist twist. The six wives of Henry VIII become a fierce girl group who take back their crowns and rewrite their histories in the style of a rousing arena concert.

shows.title: MJ The Musical
shows.description: Experience the story behind the King of Pop's singular career and greatest hits. The Tony-winning musical offers a deep look into his creative process and all the energy of a Michael Jackson concert, complete with more than 20 of his classic songs and signature dance moves.

shows.title: A Woman Among Women
shows.venue: LCT3 at the Claire Tow Theater
shows.description: *A Woman Among Women* centers on Cleo, founder of the local women’s wellness group, as she tries to hold her fragile community together.

shows.title: Morgan Bassichis: Can I Be Frank?
shows.description: *Can I Be Frank?* is a new solo show from comedian Morgan Bassichis that pays homage to another queer comedian, Frank Maya, who died of from AIDS-related complications.

shows.title: Death Becomes Her
shows.description: Based on the classic 1992 film, *Death Becomes Her* the musical follows two frenemies, actress Madeline Ashton and author Helen Sharp, who take a potion for eternal youth to outdo each other once and for all — but things don't go as planned. Now the recipient of 10 Tony Award nominations.

shows.title: Just in Time
shows.description: *Just in Time* is a new, six-time Tony Award-nominated bio-musical about Grammy Hall of Fame Award winner Bobby Darin. This jukebox show traces the singer’s rise to stardom, marriage to Sandra Dee, and the personal surprises that upended his life.

shows.title: Two Strangers (Carry a Cake Across New York)
shows.description: *Two Strangers (Carry a Cake Across New York)* is an original, new musical comedy about two ordinary people, a cheery Brit and a lifelong New Yorker, who go on a city adventure and spark a connection along the way.

shows.title: Giulia: The Poison Queen of Palermo
shows.description: *Giulia: The Poison Queen of Palermo* is a new musical about a woman, her self-defense, and the unique sisterhood it unleashes.

shows.title: Proof
shows.description: *Proof* is a modern play about two sisters grieving their father's death while also wrestling with his legacy, and which sister has inherited his genius.

shows.title: Stranger Things: The First Shadow
shows.description: Get *Stranger Things: The First Shadow* tickets and see the world before it turns upside down. The origin story of the hit Netflix series follows younger versions of fan-favorite characters as they deal with unusual happenings in Hawkins. Now nominated for five Tony Awards.

shows.title: An American Daughter
shows.venue: The Irene Diamond Stage at the Pershing Square Signature Center

shows.title: Label•less
shows.description: *Label•less* is a new musical experience that gives voice to today's issues, sharing the resilience needed to overcome barriers.

shows.title: SMALL
shows.description: An acclaimed solo show, *Small* is about big dreams — both on the race track and on Broadway.
